issues.description: Action type 'PlayFromHand' is incorrect. The effect sets up a character already on board (activates it from resting state to active), not plays from hand. Should use 'Rest' with a negation or a dedicated 'Activate' action, or clarify as setting a character on board as active.
Filter only includes 'Supernovas' but card text says 'Supernovas' OR 'Straw Hat Crew'. Filter must support both types via OR logic or array.

Target scope 'Self' is incorrect. The power boost applies to the character that was set up (the target of the first action), not to the card performing the activation. Target should reference the selected character.
